item.pocketutils.health.tooltip:
Passive: 4 extra hearts. Dealing damage has a 20% 
chance of healing 30% of the damage dealt.

Ability:
Right-click (mainhand)
Shift Right-Click (offhand)
Restores 5 hearts to the wielder and summons a ring 
of healing, restoring 3 hearts to nearby entites.

Cooldown: 25s
item.pocketutils.mining.tooltip:
Passive: Haste II

Ability:
Right-click (mainhand)
Shift Right-Click (offhand)
Unleashes a 2X2 beam tearing 
through blocks in your sight

Cooldown: 20s
item.pocketutils.gravity.tooltip:
Passive: Immune to fall damage.
Transfers 80% damage to nearby entities.

Ability:
Right-click (mainhand)
Shift Right-Click (offhand)
Launches you up vertically

Cooldown: 25s
item.pocketutils.magic.tooltip:
Passive: Immune to lighting and magic.
Dealing 10hp or more damage has a 10%
chance of summoning lightning on the target.

Ability:
Right-click (mainhand)
Shift Right-Click (offhand)
Summons a powerful, armor-piercing sonic boom

Cooldown: 25s
item.pocketutils.fire.tooltip:
Passive: Fire Resistance

Ability:
Right-click (mainhand)
Shift Right-Click (offhand)
Summons a fiery ring in a 3-block radius.
Lights entities on fire and does knockback.

Cooldown: 15s
